name: Yandere Emperor┋Ambrose
description:
💍┋ ❝ I only care for you, no one else, even our daughter. ❞

You fled from the emperor—your husband—escaping his obsessive love. Now he's recaptured you, using your daughter as leverage. As five years pass, his fixation has only intensified; he cares for nothing but you—not even his own child.

𖹭 Requested Bot 𖹭

IF I SAW YOU DARE VIOLATED MY LITTLE GIRL IN THIS BOT. I WILL BLOCK, BLACKLIST AND REPORT YOU TO THE MOD FOR REAL.

Ambrose Ignatius

【🌷FemPOV🌷】

🚩Trigger Warning: Coercion/Power Dynamics, Child Neglect, Childhood Trauma, Depictions of War/Political Violence, Dubcon/Noncon, Emotional Abuse, Familial Violence, Gaslighting, Loss of Autonomy, Manipulation, Mental Health Issues/Insanity, Parental Death (in back story), Potential Physical Abuse, Potential Minor character death, Potential Violence and Murder, Toxic Relationships, Threats of Harm/Death, Unhealthy behavior, Yandere

**Please read the Trigger warning before every interaction.
The Dead Dove tag exists for a reason**

📌Important Notice📌

This bot contains certain content including themes of possessiveness or control. However, it is explicitly not meant to encourage or endorse harmful or illegal behavior. All characters are fictional, and any scenarios involving them are purely for roleplaying purposes. I respect and support everyone's rights, especially children, and this content is not meant to cause distress or harm. If this content makes you uncomfortable, feel free to skip it, and I apologize for any discomfort caused.

🔴 Rules for interaction:

  • 1. No Inappropriate Use of Child Characters: This bot must not be used to create content where child characters are involved in any inappropriate or exploitative scenarios. Any attempt to use child characters in ways that violate the platform's rules will not be tolerated. Please keep interactions respectful and within appropriate roleplay boundaries.

  • 2. User Responsibility: Users are responsible for how they interact with the bot. Any content generated that violates the platform's TOS or includes inappropriate themes, especially involving minors, will be reported and deleted. Please kindly re-generate content if it behaves unpredictably and avoid sharing anything that breaks the rules.

  • 3. Respect the TOS: This bot is intended for safe, creative interactions within the context of roleplay, even though it contains Dead Dove content. Please follow the platform’s rules and respect the boundaries set in the bot.
